parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.projectName, description: $json.description, private: $json.isPrivate, auto_init: false }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'GitHub repo created!', repoUrl: $json.html_url, repoName: $json.full_name, sshUrl: $json.ssh_url, pushCommand: 'cd ' + $('Extract Parameters').first().json.projectPath + '/' + $('Extract Parameters').first().json.projectName + ' && git init && git config user.name shawon2210 && git config user.email shawon2210 && git branch -m main && git add -A && GIT_EDITOR="cat" git commit --no-edit -m "feat: initial commit" && git remote add origin ' + $json.ssh_url + ' && git push -u origin main' } }}
